name: conversation-agent-dev-assistant
description: Developer assistant skills for installing, understanding, optimizing, and troubleshooting Conversation Agent Service.

interface.shortDescription: Install, tune, and troubleshoot Conversation Agent Service.
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skills for installing Conversation Agent Service from customer artifacts, understanding service boundaries, optimizing workspace prompts and actions, and troubleshooting Live E2E validation.
defaultPrompt: Use Conversation Agent Developer Assistant to install Conversation Agent Service from my customer artifact.
Use conversation-agent-optimize-prompts to tune my workspace prompts and action triggers.
Use conversation-agent-troubleshoot-live-e2e to diagnose my Web or ZEGO Live E2E issue.
